title: Properties of a Stationary Time Series Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the key properties that define a stationary process and their implications for time series analysis.
relationships: These properties must ALL be true for a process to be considered Weakly Stationary. A stationary process is the foundation for many time series models (e.g., AR, MA, ARMA) as its statistical properties are stable over time, making it predictable.
